RegLoan Bank — Underwriting Policy & Rate Sheet Document POL-0002 Page 2 of 2 APR Rate Matrix by FICO x LTV (cont.) Loan-to-Value tier APR FICO Band LTV <=80% LTV 81-90% LTV 91-100% LTV 101-110% LTV 111-120% 700-739 7.13% 3.87% 5.21% 10.86% 10.87% 740-779 13.08% 4.29% 9.54% 12.28% 11.85% 780+ 9.47% 12.77% 9.6% 12.99% 13.21% OK — UW
